title_cn: SpaceX 的大型 IPO 为错失良机的恐惧定价
summary: Elon Musk has turned science fiction into reality for the better part of two decades, making believers rich and earning the benefit of the doubt from many on Wall Street. Away from rockets and electric cars, his companies are bending reality on another plane – convincing analysts to stretch their traditional valuation tools, and assign multiples based on what one academic calls “optionalities.”

summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. said a key late-stage melanoma study failed, adding to a series of challenges for the US biotech. The shares plunged in premarket trading.

title: Drug Companies Spurned by Supreme Court on Price Negotiation Law
title_cn: 药品公司因价格谈判法被最高法院驳回
summary: The US Supreme Court turned away appeals from six pharmaceutical companies seeking to topple the Medicare drug price negotiation program that’s led to billions of dollars in discounts on top-selling treatments.

summary: What makes this outbreak especially concerning isn’t just the disease, but where it’s happening.

title_cn: 随着焦虑情绪蔓延，欧洲股市涨势瓦解
summary: The Stoxx Europe 600 is now a laggard compared to other indices

title: Blue Owl Fund Returns to Market With $400 Million Bond Offering
title_cn: Blue Owl 基金重返市场发行 4 亿美元债券
summary: A Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit fund sold a $400 million investment-grade bond, a month after a debt sale to bond giant Pacific Investment Management Co. helped ease capital-access worries.

title: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises as Hormuz Deal Hopes Fade: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 霍尔木兹协议希望破灭，股市下跌，油价上涨：市场总结
summary: Wall Street’s rebound attempt failed, with stocks falling as oil climbed after doubts resurfaced about an imminent US-Iran deal that would revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary:
Description: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test."

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Believer in International Diversification: Kellert
title_cn: 国际多元化的信徒：凯勒特
summary:
Kathy Kellert, head of index equity product at Vanguard, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the recently launched Vanguard Developed Markets ex-US Value Index ETF (ticker: VDV) and Vanguard Developed Markets ex-US Growth Index ETF (ticker: VDG).  

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Buyer Fatigue Credit: Matt Brill
title_cn: 一些买家的疲劳信用：Matt Brill
summary: Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss high-grade credit, inflation's impact on fixed income, and the Invesco Total Return Bond ETF (Ticker: GTO).  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NextEra’s Mega-Utility Deal to Shore Up Its Credit Profile
title_cn: NextEra 的大型公用事业交易将巩固其信用状况
summary: NextEra Energy Inc.’s $67 billion bid for Dominion Energy Inc. won’t just create an energy giant stretching from Florida to Virginia, it’s also helping the power firm shore up its credit standing in the eyes of rating companies.

title: Brightline Senior Bonds May Recover Just 44 Cents: CreditSights
title_cn: Brightline 高级债券可能仅回升 44 美分：CreditSights
summary: Investors holding Brightline Florida’s $2.2 billion of senior bonds could get as little as 44 cents on the dollar in a bankruptcy or restructuring, according to CreditSights. Holders of lower ranked debt could be wiped out in a worst-case scenario.

title: Citadel Securities’ Rubner Sees Risk of Flow Unwind in US Stocks
title_cn: Citadel 证券的鲁布纳认为美国股市存在资金流动解除的风险
summary: Risks are growing of an unwind in the powerful fund flows that drove US stocks to record highs in recent weeks, according to Citadel Securities’ Scott Rubner.

title: Global Bond Sell Off Hits Markets, JPMorgan's Tokenized Fund Filing | ETF IQ 5/18/2026
title_cn: 摩根大通代币化基金备案，全球债券遭遇抛售ETF IQ 2026 年 5 月 18 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Invesco head of North America Investment Grade Credit Matt Brill, SS&C Alps Advisors Head of Fund Sales and Strategy Paul Baiocchi, and Vanguard Head of Index Equity Product Kathy Kellert. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Reviews Ban on Trading Through Best Price on Stocks
title_cn: 白宫审查禁止通过最佳股票价格进行交易
summary: The White House is reviewing whether to amend and potentially scrap a decades-old rule governing stock trading that’s meant to make sure investors get better prices for their transactions.

title: Delta to Prioritize Global Expansion Over Domestic Transactions
title_cn: 达美航空将优先考虑全球扩张而非国内交易
summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. Chief Executive Officer Ed Bastian said he’ll sit out consolidation in the US aviation market and instead focus on expanding abroad through partnerships, even as high fuel prices and a transaction-minded administration stand to shake up the domestic industry.

title: Stock Rally Falters as Investors Eye Inflation | Open Interest 5/18/2026
title_cn: 投资者关注通胀，股市涨势动摇未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 18 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks fall as bond yields stay near multiyear highs. NextEra strikes the biggest power deal ever, SpaceX’s mega IPO fuels Wall Street FOMO, and Nvidia nears a potential $6 trillion inflection point. Plus, MIAX CEO Thomas Gallagher and Ramaco CEO Randall Atkins joined Bloomberg Open Interest with a deep dive into AI power demand, retail futures, and America’s rare earths race. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Long Bond Yields Hover Near the Highest Levels Since 2023
title_cn: 美国长期债券收益率徘徊在2023年以来最高水平附近
summary: Yields on 30-year US Treasuries hovered near the highest levels in almost three years as investors tried to balance their worries over inflation with optimism that the US and Iran will eventually make progress toward a deal to end hostilities.

title: Belarus Starts Nuclear Drills With Russia Amid Kyiv Warnings
title_cn: 白俄罗斯在基辅警告中开始与俄罗斯进行核演习
summary: Belarus announced that its armed forces would conduct snap nuclear exercises alongside Russian allies, following warnings from Kyiv that it could retaliate if Minsk becomes more deeply involved in the Kremlin’s war.

title: Vanguard Favors Treasuries as 10-Year Yields Near Range Top
title_cn: 先锋集团青睐国债，因为十年期国债收益率接近区间顶部
summary: Vanguard Group Inc., one of the world’s largest money managers, is sticking with its bet on US Treasuries, saying yields in the $31 trillion market are near the top of its expected range for 10-year notes.

title: Ramaco CEO Faults China Steel Dumping for Met-Coal Miners’ Woe
title_cn: 拉马科首席执行官将中国钢铁倾销归咎于煤炭开采商的困境
summary: Ramaco Resources Inc.’s chief executive officer said Chinese steel dumping is hammering US miners as smelters around the world try to keep pace by demanding lower costs for metallurgical coal.

title: Gold Trims Gains as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
title_cn: 交易商权衡伊朗协议前景和通胀，黄金涨幅回落
summary: Gold pared gains as investors assessed the prospects of a US-Iran ceasefire deal, while also weighing the odds that elevated energy prices will prompt central banks to keep interest rates higher for longer.

title: SpaceX IPO Will Add Another Musk Stock. It’s a Problem for Tesla
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 将再增加一只马斯克股票。这对特斯拉来说是个问题
summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.

title: MIAX Bets Big on Retail Futures
title_cn: MIAX 大举押注零售期货
summary: MIAX CEO Thomas Gallagher joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the exchange is betting big on retail futures trading, how mega IPOs like SpaceX could reshape options markets, and why Miami is emerging as “Wall Street South.” The conversation also covers Bloomberg’s new equity index futures launch and the next phase of MIAX’s expansion strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rises on Doubts Over US, Iran Stance to End Conflict
title_cn: 由于对美国和伊朗结束冲突的立场存疑，油价上涨
summary: Oil edged higher in choppy trading as the US and Iran appeared stuck at an impasse over several key issues needed to secure a peace deal and reopen the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Ghana Seeks 30% of Large Gold Mines’ Output For Local Refineries
title_cn: 加纳寻求将大型金矿产量的 30% 用于当地炼油厂
summary: Ghana wants large-scale gold mines to sell at least 30% of their annual output to the central bank to increase local refining and boost the country’s foreign-exchange reserves.

title: Texas Fund Revealed as Record Backer of State Street Credit ETF
title_cn: 德州基金成为道富信贷 ETF 创纪录支持者
summary: The identity of an investor that dramatically boosted assets in State Street Corp.’s private credit ETF has been revealed as a $60 billion sovereign wealth fund that provides funding to Texas public schools.

title: US Stocks Dip as Investors Eye Inflation, Chips Stocks Retreat
title_cn: 由于投资者关注通胀，美国股市下跌，芯片股回落
summary: US stocks fell Monday in midday trading as oil prices rebounded amid doubts about the progress of peace talks between the US and Iran. Yields on 10-year Treasuries touched 4.6% and semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.

title: EU Selects EQT to Manage New €5 Billion Technology Fund
title_cn: 欧盟选择殷拓管理新的 50 亿欧元技术基金
summary: EQT AB has won the mandate to manage a new European Union fund for investing in quantum computing, artificial intelligence and other deep tech companies.

title: Spain’s ACS Offers €2.2 Billion Stake to Fund Data Center Plans
title_cn: 西班牙 ACS 出资 22 亿欧元资助数据中心计划
summary: ACS Actividades de Construcción y Servicios SA is looking to sell about 6% of its shares to fund data centers and other AI-related infrastructure.

title: The Shock Is Dead, Long Live the Shock!
title_cn: 震撼已死，震撼万岁！
summary: Constant disruptions can’t really be labeled as ‘one-offs.’

title: Royal Caribbean Slides After Mexico Reviews Water Park Project
title_cn: 墨西哥审查水上乐园项目后皇家加勒比下滑
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. shares fell on Monday after Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum ordered a review of the cruise line operator’s water park project in Quintana Roo state.

title: Europe Must Stand Up for Itself in Global Economy, Germany Says
title_cn: 德国表示欧洲必须在全球经济中维护自己的地位
summary: German Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil said Europe must assert its own interests against global competitors with measures such as favoring companies from the region.

title: West Marine Files Bankruptcy to Cut Debt, Close More Stores
title_cn: 西海军陆战队申请破产以削减债务，关闭更多商店
summary: Boating supply retailer West Marine Inc. filed for bankruptcy protection, citing weaker sales as consumers pull back on outdoor recreation because of inflation and several years of severe weather.

title: Dell Adds 1,000 Clients for AI Gear, Targets Corporate Users
title_cn: 戴尔为 AI Gear 添加 1,000 个客户端，瞄准企业用户
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. said it added 1,000 customers for a key AI product line in the past quarter as the company tries to capture business from traditional large businesses taking on new artificial intelligence workloads.

title: AI Drives Record-Busting Run for DRAM ETF
title_cn: 人工智能推动 DRAM ETF 创纪录运行
summary: Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee and Vildana Hajric joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." The Roundhill Memory ETF (ticker: DRAM) assets are nearly $10 Billion since launching April 2nd.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How to 'Electrify' Your Portfolio: Baiocchi
title_cn: 如何让你的投资组合“电气化”：Baiocchi
summary: Paul Baiocchi, head of fund sales and strategy at SS&C ALPS Advisors, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the ALPS Electrification Infrastructure ETF (ticker: ELFY).  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s Future
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 因 OpenAI 的未来而败诉萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman)
summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company.

title: Jury Says Elon Musk Sued Sam Altman Too Late Over OpenAI
title_cn: 陪审团称埃隆·马斯克就 OpenAI 问题起诉山姆·奥尔特曼为时已晚
summary: A federal jury rejects Elon Musk's claims about OpenAI under Sam Altman and says he waited too long to sue. Musk took Altman to trial saying he went against OpenAI's mission by turning it into a for-profit business. Matthew Schettenhelm of Bloomberg Intelligence has been following the case and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Boosts Stake in Delivery Hero, Says No Takeover for Now
title_cn: Uber增持Delivery Hero股份，表示暂时不会收购
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has increased its stake in German food delivery company Delivery Hero SE, underscoring its ambitions to counter competition from DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

title: SpaceX IPO Could Value Company at $2 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股可能使公司估值达到 2 万亿美元
summary: “We’ve got to get the SpaceX IPO stuff going here pretty soon,” Elon Musk said at a tech summit in Israel on Monday. He's looking to raise as much as $75 billion on a valuation of more than $2 trillion. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NextEra-Dominion Deal Signals Era of AI Utility Mega-Mergers
title_cn: NextEra-Dominion 交易标志着人工智能公用事业大型合并时代的到来
summary: NextEra Energy Inc.’s $67 billion deal for rival Dominion Energy Inc., the largest utility acquisition in US history, suggests even the industry’s biggest companies need to grow in order to accommodate the power demand driven by artificial intelligence.

title: Apple Readies AI Writing Help, App Shortcuts and Wallpapers for iOS 27
title_cn: Apple 为 iOS 27 准备了人工智能写作帮助、应用程序快捷方式和壁纸
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a wave of artificial intelligence features for its next iPhone and iPad operating systems, including a grammar checker and new shortcut options, part of an effort to narrow the gap with capabilities available on rival devices.

title: Anthropic Sends Jolt Through Market for Buying Shares in Hot Pre-IPO Startups
title_cn: Anthropic 购买热门上市前初创公司股票，震动市场
summary: In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. Similar questions reverberated more publicly across X, Reddit and Chinese-language social media, as investors worried whether their shares in the artificial intelligence developer — one of the most coveted private companies — had suddenly become worthless.Days later, ther

title: Trafigura and Tether Are Discussing USDT Usage in Fuel Stations
title_cn: 托克和 Tether 正在讨论 USDT 在加油站的使用
summary: Commodity trading house Trafigura Group Pte Ltd. is in talks with Tether Inc. about a pilot project to use its stablecoin at fuel stations.

title: Fermi Details Reasons Behind Firing CEO Who Posed ‘Threat’
title_cn: 费米详细解释了解雇构成“威胁”的首席执行官背后的原因
summary: Fermi Inc. said it fired its former chief executive officer after his actions threatened the company’s efforts to build what it describes as the world’s largest private power complex for data centers.

title: Stripe’s Collison on How Agentic Commerce Will Reshape the Internet
title_cn: Stripe 的 Collison 谈代理商务将如何重塑互联网
summary:
With the rise of AI agents doing shopping on behalf of consumers, how are retailers going to adapt?

John Collison, Stripe's co-founder and president, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss how AI has already changed the way consumers make purchasing decisions and whether AI agents can truly mimic human taste. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Seagate Slips as CEO Says New Factories Would ‘Take Too Long’
title_cn: 希捷股价下滑，首席执行官表示新工厂“需要太长时间”
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings shares slumped as much as 8.3% after management comments at a JPMorgan conference sparked investor fears that the company won’t be able to keep up with soaring demand for memory chips.

title: Nvidia Q1 Revenue Expected to Reach Record $79 Billion
title_cn: 英伟达第一季度收入预计将达到创纪录的 790 亿美元
summary: Nvidia is expected to set another revenue record when it reports quarterly earnings on Wednesday. Investors are looking for updates on its $1 trillion data-center revenue target. Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde has a preview.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NextEra Energy to Acquire Dominion Energy in $67 Billion Deal
title_cn: NextEra Energy 将以 670 亿美元的价格收购 Dominion Energy
summary: NextEra Energy agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy in the biggest power acquisition ever. Bloomberg's Emily Forgash reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk’s xAI Fails to Pay Staff $420 for Giving Their Tax Returns to Grok
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 未能向向 Grok 提供纳税申报表的员工支付 420 美元
summary: Elon Musk’s xAI asked employees earlier this year to offer up their own tax returns as training data for the company’s Grok chatbot, promising a $420 payment as incentive for doing so. Two months later, those payments still haven’t materialized.

title: Baidu AI Sales Eclipse Waning Legacy Ads for the First Time
title_cn: 百度人工智能销售额首次超越传统广告
summary: Baidu Inc. posted a better-than-feared 1% drop in revenue after growth in nascent AI businesses offset a steady decline in traditional internet revenue, buying the search leader time to catch rivals such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. in the post-ChatGPT era.

title: Pope to Launch Encyclical on AI Alongside Anthropic Co-Founder
title_cn: 教皇将与 Anthropic 联合创始人一起发布人工智能通谕
summary: Pope Leo XIV’s launch of his first encyclical focusing on artificial intelligence next week will feature an unexpected guest: Christopher Olah, co-founder of Anthropic.

title: Google’s Own AI Researchers Jockey for Access to Its Computing
title_cn: 谷歌自己的人工智能研究人员争夺其计算资源
summary: In the race to build the infrastructure that powers artificial intelligence, Alphabet Inc.’s Google has an enviable position: The company has a healthy cloud computing business, makes its own chips, and has struck deals to share them with companies like Anthropic PBC and Meta Platforms Inc.

title: The Future of AI Is in West Texas
title_cn: 人工智能的未来在德克萨斯州西部
summary: Out in West Texas, the future of AI can be seen in driverless trucks. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Thomas Black traveled to learn more about the new technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Five Reasons Why Investors are Selling Government Bonds
title_cn: 投资者出售政府债券的五个原因
summary: Bonds are buckling around the world, propelling borrowing costs to multi-year highs. Ruth Carson explains why. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Are Undervaluing Video Game Talent and IP, Investor Says
title_cn: 投资者称市场低估了视频游戏人才和知识产权
summary: Kensei Capital founder wants to help game makers scale up

title: AI Is Shifting the Corporate Pyramid in Favor of Older Workers
title_cn: 人工智能正在改变企业金字塔，有利于年长员工
summary: The shift is poised to be strongest in Europe and Asia.

title: Can AI Drug Development Live Up to the Hype?
title_cn: 人工智能药物开发能否达到宣传的效果？
summary: Big Pharma is pouring money into tech-devised treatments, but the verdict is out on whether they’ll actually work.

title: DraftKings, Meta, AI Firms Have a New Election Playbook: Flood State-Level Races With Cash
title_cn: DraftKings、Meta、人工智能公司推出了新的选举手册：用现金淹没州级竞选
summary: With Congress largely stalemated, companies turn to states to gain leverage over regulations.

title: Elon Musk Really Needs Starship to Work This Time
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克这次真的需要星际飞船才能工作
summary: With the V3 launch, SpaceX hopes to prove that the massive vehicle it’s betting everything on will perform as advertised.

title: US, Philippines Moving ‘Very Quickly’ on 4,000-Acre AI Hub Plan
title_cn: 美国、菲律宾“快速”推进 4000 英亩人工智能中心计划
summary: The US and the Philippines are moving “very, very quickly” on a planned artificial intelligence and supply chain hub in the Southeast Asian nation, a top US official said, as Washington seeks long-term protection for American investors.

title: StanChart to Absorb Zodia Subsidiary’s Crypto Custody Business
title_cn: 渣打银行将吸收 Zodia 子公司的加密货币托管业务
summary: Standard Chartered Plc plans to acquire the crypto custody business of its majority-owned subsidiary Zodia Custody Ltd., expanding the reach of the bank’s own digital-asset operations.

title: American Missionary Has Ebola; US Bans Travel From Area
title_cn: 美国传教士感染埃博拉病毒；美国禁止该地区旅行
summary: A US missionary has tested positive for the Ebola virus after being exposed in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said Monday.

title: 'AI is Changing Everything' in Higher Education Says Georgia Tech President
title_cn: 佐治亚理工学院校长表示，“人工智能正在改变高等教育的一切”
summary: Ángel Cabrera, President of Georgia Institute of Technology joined Balance of Power on the road in Georgia to discuss the outlook for Higher Education amid economic uncertainty and how AI is impacting the way students are learning in colleges and universities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Georgia Sees Record Early Voting As Primaries Loom
title_cn: 初选临近，佐治亚州提前投票创历史新高
summary: Former Atlanta Mayor Shirley Franklin joined Balance of Power live from Georgia saying the record turnout for early voting in Georgia shows that voters are paying attention to what's going on in the country and the state and they're deeply engaged. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The 'Pocketbook' is The Number One Issue For Voters Says Chambliss
title_cn: 钱布利斯表示，“钱包”是选民的首要问题
summary: Saxby Chambliss, former US Senator from Georgia (R), former Senate Agriculture, Nutrition and Forestry Committee Chairman (2005-07), former Ranking Member of the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence (2011-12) joined Balance of Power to discuss the Georgia primary race tomorrow and what the voter is really focused on in 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Issues New Russia Oil Waiver as Iran War Crunches Supplies
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争导致供应紧张，美国对俄罗斯实施新的石油豁免
summary: The US on Monday issued a new waiver allowing the sale of Russian crude oil and petroleum products that are already loaded on tankers, days after the previous one lapsed.

title: US and Iran Still at Odds Despite Renewed Diplomatic Efforts
title_cn: 尽管重新做出外交努力，美国和伊朗仍存在分歧
summary: A deal to end the Iran war remains elusive after Washington and Tehran rejected fresh proposals as insufficient to secure an agreement.

title: Dimon, Solomon to Meet With Mamdani as Mayor Pushes Higher Taxes
title_cn: 戴蒙、所罗门将与马姆达尼会面，市长推动提高税收
summary: Zohran Mamdani was set to hold individual meetings with Jamie Dimon, chief executive officer at JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. CEO David Solomon, as New York City’s democratic socialist mayor seeks to build relations with the business community.

title: US to Issue New Russia Oil Waiver as Iran War Hits Supplies
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争影响供应，美国将发布新的俄罗斯石油豁免
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Monday said his department is issuing a “temporary 30-day general license” allowing the sale of Russian crude oil and petroleum products that are already loaded on tankers. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil’s Government Now Sees Inflation Soaring Past Target for Longer on Iran War
title_cn: 巴西政府现在认为伊朗战争导致通胀飙升超过目标的时间更长
summary: Brazil’s Finance Ministry raised its consumer price forecasts sharply and now sees inflation running above target through at least 2027, reflecting the shock from the Middle East war.

title: EU Ties Part of Ukraine €90 Billion Aid to Unpopular Tax Measure
title_cn: 欧盟将乌克兰部分地区 900 亿欧元的援助与不受欢迎的税收措施挂钩
summary: The European Union will tie some payouts from the €90 billion ($105 billion) aid package for Ukraine to an unpopular tax change already demanded by the International Monetary Fund, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Trump to Swear In Warsh as Fed Chair on Friday, White House Says
title_cn: 白宫表示，特朗普将于周五宣誓就任美联储主席
summary: Kevin Warsh will be sworn in as Federal Reserve chair by President Donald Trump on Friday during a ceremony at the White House, an official said.

title: Burnham Rails Against Thatcher in Leadership Pitch to Labour
title_cn: 伯纳姆在工党领导力宣传中反对撒切尔夫人
summary: Pitching to succeed Keir Starmer, Andy Burnham invoked the specter of another former British prime minister — Margaret Thatcher — in his bid to win back working-class voters.

title: DOJ Creates $1.8 Billion Fund Under Trump IRS Settlement Accord
title_cn: DOJ 根据特朗普 IRS 和解协议设立 18 亿美元基金
summary: The US Justice Department said it’s creating a $1.8 billion fund to pay out claims of alleged government weaponization as part of a settlement agreement to end President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service over the 2019 leak of his tax information.

title: Sheinbaum Backs Reform Proposal Ahead of Next Judicial Vote
title_cn: 希恩鲍姆在下次司法投票之前支持改革提案
summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum will submit a proposal to Congress to reform an upcoming judicial election, following widespread criticism of the erratic rulings of inexperienced judges elected during the first vote last year.

title: Revolt Against Starmer Reignites Debate on Undoing Brexit
title_cn: 对斯塔默的反抗重新引发了关于取消英国脱欧的争论
summary:
The revolt against Prime Minister Keir Starmer has reignited debate about reversing Brexit — nearly 10 years after the UK voted to leave the EU.

Alex Wickham explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DOJ Seeks to Drop US Criminal Charges Against Gautam Adani
title_cn: 美国司法部寻求撤销美国对高塔姆·阿达尼的刑事指控
summary: The Justice Department sought to drop criminal charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani.

title: Ukraine Says It’s Unsure of US Stance on Russia Oil Sanctions
title_cn: 乌克兰表示不确定美国对俄罗斯石油制裁的立场
summary: Ukraine remains uncertain about the US position on Russian oil, even after Washington let its waiver for purchases of Russian crude expire.

title: Ebola Case in Rebel-Held Goma Complicates Congo Relief Response
title_cn: 叛军控制的戈马的埃博拉病例使刚果的救援工作变得更加复杂
summary: An Ebola case detected in Goma, the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo city seized by Rwanda-backed rebels last year, is highlighting how conflict and decrepit infrastructure could hamper efforts to contain the virus.

title: Cornyn, Paxton Trade Blows as Early Voting Begins in Texas Brawl
title_cn: 德克萨斯州斗殴提前投票开始，科宁和帕克斯顿交易爆发
summary: As John Cornyn closes out a cutthroat primary election that threatens to end his 24-year tenure in the US Senate, the Republican is trying to leave voters with a simple message: He’s just as MAGA as the rest of the party faithful.

title: White House to Announce TrumpRx Expansion With Mark Cuban
title_cn: 白宫将与马克·库班一起宣布 TrumpRx 扩张
summary: The Trump administration is adding generic medications to its direct-to-consumer drug sales website TrumpRx and billionaire Mark Cuban is set to attend the White House rollout Monday afternoon, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Iran Starts Bitcoin-Backed Ship Insurance for Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 伊朗为霍尔木兹海峡启动比特币支持的船舶保险
summary: Iran has started a Bitcoin-backed insurance service for Iranian shipping companies that want to transit the Strait of Hormuz, the semi-official Fars news agency reported, citing documents obtained from the country’s Ministry of Economy and Financial Affairs.

title: Vaccine Panel Charter Rescinded by HHS After Administrative Error
title_cn: 行政错误后，美国卫生与公众服务部 (HHS) 撤销了疫苗小组章程
summary: The US Department of Health and Human Services has rescinded the committee charter for a key vaccine advisory panel after previously changing the rules to allow Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to remake the group.

title: Adani Enterprises Reaches $275 Million Settlement With Treasury
title_cn: Adani Enterprises 与财政部达成 2.75 亿美元和解
summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd. agreed to pay $275 million over a probe by the Office of Foreign Assets Control, putting the Indian conglomerate a step closer to resolving its legal troubles in the US.

title: South African Court Limits State Role in Doctor Placements
title_cn: 南非法院限制国家在医生安置中的作用
summary: South Africa’s top court struck down parts of a law that would enable the government to determine where doctors and other healthcare professionals can work, because their constitutional rights would be undermined.

title: Starmer Rejects Calls to Set Out Timetable to Quit as UK Premier
title_cn: 斯塔默拒绝制定退出英国首相时间表的呼吁
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he intends to lead Labour into the next general election, facing down mounting pressure from within his own party to step aside in the wake of disastrous local election results this month.

title: Greenland Leader Says Trump’s Aim Unchanged After Envoy Talks
title_cn: 格陵兰领导人表示特使会谈后特朗普的目标没有改变
summary: Greenland’s leader said he had a “constructive” meeting with Donald Trump’s envoy to the Arctic island, but warned there were no signs the US president has changed his ambition to acquire the territory.

title: Ford in Talks to Supply Military Trucks in Europe, North America
title_cn: 福特正在洽谈向欧洲和北美供应军用卡车
summary: Ford Motor Co. is in negotiations with defense departments in Europe and North America to supply pickup trucks and software to their armed forces.
